title: Gantt Chart for Project Timeline
scenario: Create a Gantt chart for a project with multiple tasks, dependencies, and milestones. The chart should include task bars, dependency arrows, and milestone markers. The chart should be suitable for a project timeline and should accommodate 15 tasks and 5 milestones.
constraints: Must use a consistent format for task bars and dependency arrows
Must include a note for task dependencies and milestones
Must include a note for project start and end dates

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the chart adheres to the given constraints.
Check if task bars and dependency arrows are accurate and complete.
Check if milestone markers are accurate and complete.
